PermitPulse is not a raw lookup. It is a second set of eyes on the official record before you make the wrong move.

PermitPulse also tracks public-record signals through the Red Tape Index, Radar, and Top Permits pages. See the sample report or who it helps.

PermitPulse is a first-pass public-record review. It is not a legal opinion, architectural opinion, title report, survey, code determination, permit expeditor service, or permit approval guarantee.
